goal: Add HermesProxy.emit('sessionChanged', id) inside loadMessages(id) so plugins know when user switches sessions

details.location: Inside loadMessages(sessionId) function, at the top or after fetching messages
details.notes: loadMessages is called when a session is clicked. Use currentSessionId (already set to the new id).

guard_focus: Does emit fire with a valid sessionId string?
Does it fire BEFORE or AFTER messages are loaded (spec says before is fine, but AFTER is better)?
Is there any case where loadMessages is called with null/undefined?
